task: v0.4.11: get_diagnostics + locale-close-modals fix + chairman diagnostic helper
summary: v0.4.11: get_diagnostics + locale-close-modals fix + chairman diagnostic helper
reason: Chairman explicitly asked for a detailed local log + a real local run of v0.4.11, so the chairman could compare his real machine against it. Three deliverables: (1) NEW Tauri command 'get_diagnostics' that returns a JSON snapshot of: data_dir + log_dir paths, tauri_version, which env vars (MINIMAX_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.) are set/unset, workdir_json + nwt_root_json file state, secrets_count (from keychain), sidecar_path, log_tail, and timestamp. Chairman can invoke this from the dev console and share the output. (2) BUG-FRONTEND-RT-??: language toggle in TopBar was blocked by the Settings modal backdrop — clicking 🌐 中文 when the modal was open would fail. Fix: TopBar dispatches a custom 'flowntier:close-modals' event; App listens for it and calls setSettingsOpen(false) BEFORE the locale toggle fires. So language switching works regardless of modal state. (3) scripts/diagnose.cmd — a chairman-facing diagnostic helper that captures running processes (tasklist), install dir state (O:\Flowntier + C:\Program Files\Flowntier), AppData state (%APPDATA%\flowntier), env vars (all 7 known keys), and NSIS log presence. Output goes to C:\Users\thatg\flowntier-diagnose.txt. Also wrote C:\Users\thatg\v0411-diagnostics-comparison.md with: (a) local test results, (b) get_diagnostics example output, (c) what chairman should do step-by-step (uninstall old → run diagnose → install → run diagnose again → test → report), (d) honest disclaimers — the local test does NOT prove v0.4.11 works on chairman's real Windows machine. It only proves code compiles, 0 console errors, NSIS builds, sidecar check patch works. Real hands-on test is the only verification path. Local E2E: 0 page errors, 0 console errors, 6 screenshots, full log at C:\Users\thatg\v0411-local.log. Build: 39/39 Rust E2E pass, pnpm typecheck clean, Tauri NSIS build produces 16,080,216-byte v0.4.11 installer at C:\Users\thatg\Desktop\. Patched NSIS so sidecar check is in.
